untranslatable_reason: Adam & Eve Double Bottom pattern requires candlestick pattern recognition (detecting two distinct bottoms with specific morphological characteristics: narrow/deep vs wide/shallow) which cannot be expressed using only the available price and technical indicators. The pattern detection itself is a visual/structural analysis requiring pattern-matching logic beyond simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Approximated entry conditions using trend strength (ADX_14 > 25 for bull trend confirmation) and price above 20-day SMA as proxy for bullish context. Used standard 5% stop loss based on typical pattern failure rate. Exit uses moving average crossdown as reversal signal. The actual pattern recognition (identifying Adam bottom morphology vs Eve bottom morphology) and confirmation line breakout detection cannot be translated without pattern-matching capabilities.
